Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}The full moon's the day after tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}There are only three Shadows left... We're almost done, so let's do our best, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The full moon's almost here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be on standby in the dorms tomorrow, like usual, so make sure everything's ready today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, good luck! I know everyone is going to do great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_STUDY_1008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Midterms will be starting next week...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest... I'm not sure how productive anyone will be trying to study on their own...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, that aside, try to do your best to study as well. But don't push yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_STUDY_1009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The next full moon will be our last operation, huh? It's kind of surreal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wait, I have to stop getting distracted. Exams are next week...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* It's so hard to focus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_1010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Monday's a holiday, so we have the next two days off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}...There's just one Shadow left. I'm starting to get fired up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've come this far, so we can't lose now. Let's train as much as we possibly can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_1011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}The day after tomorrow, periodic examinations begin. How are your preparations progressing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Until recently, I had been reserving my energy for the final battle. However...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}According to Mitsuru-san, studying for exams is a crucial component in preparing for the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Therefore, while I may be off to a late start, I will now initiate study mode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_STUDY_1012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Midterms start tomorrow, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can't simply ignore what happened. It's difficult to focus on studying at such a time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, it would be unwise to ignore what's right in front of you as well, cold as it may sound.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I'll try to think of something to help everyone focus on the exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Phew, the five days from hell are finally over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yo, you wanna head to ol' Tartar tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Alright! I gotta get exams off the brain, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_1017_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Phew, the five days from hell are finally over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's been pretty rough lately, but at least now that's over with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I never wanna see another essay question again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Your exams are over, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you decide to go to Tartarus, I want to go too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}I promise I'll do everything I can![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}I'll be fighting for him, too...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's been a lot more of the Lost lately, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But there's only one Shadow left. Once we destroy it, this whole thing'll be over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let's give everyone a reason to smile again... or something cool like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}The number of the Lost keeps increasing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's like everywhere I go, there's a reminder that we still need to fight Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we just have to beat one more. Then we'll finally be done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_1026_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}It will soon be a full moon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}In preparation of the final battle, I am ready to deploy to Tartarus at any time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_TARTAROS_1026_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6080 0 0}Koromaru-san appears to be both motivated and prepared as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ARAGAKI_MAX_1028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 10 -1 -1 0 0}If you don't mind, there's something I'd like to ask of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 10 -1 -1 0 0}It's about Aragaki-kun's room... I can't bear leaving it as it is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 10 -1 -1 0 0}Could I ask you to... organize his remaining belongings?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}He had no relatives to pass anything on to, and didn't have many possessions in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}His room will be cleaned out by staff next month, so if you could do what you can before {f 0 1 2}October 31st{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure it will be tough, but I would appreciate it. Thank you very much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}The next full moon will be on November 3rd.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_1031
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Only three days left.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Make sure you're fully prepared. I'm ready to train anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
